home_page_subtitle: Transform your ever-changing safety tracking link into a persistent URL and ensure continuous updates with built-in activity start notifications for your friends and family.
hiw_create_your_link_text: When you create your own personal persistent tracking link, we give you a dedicated contact to add to your phone — it contains an email address that connects to our service.
hiw_set_in_device_app_title: Set it in your device's app
hiw_set_in_device_app_text: In your device's companion app (Garmin Connect™ or the Coros app), you add our contact as a recipient for your tracking sessions. That way, whenever you start tracking, your device will send the tracking email to us.
hiw_we_handle_the_link_title: We handle the link for you
hiw_we_handle_the_link_text: Every time you start a tracking session, your device sends us a link, our service catches it, updates your personal page, and makes sure it always shows the newest link.
hiw_share_once_done_forever_text: Instead of sending your friends a new link every ride, just share your personal static URL once. They can bookmark it — it will always point to your most recent tracking session.
gs_follow_those_steps: Follow those steps to set up your persistent tracking link.
gs_create_a_tracking_recipient_text: For your device to notify us when you start a tracking session, we need you to add us as a recipient for your tracking emails.
gs_scan_or_download_contact: First, scan or download this contact card that contains a dedicated recipient email address.
gs_set_it_in_your_app_title: Set it in your device's app
gs_set_it_in_your_app_text: Select your device below and follow the instructions to add our contact as a recipient for your tracking sessions.
gs_set_it_in_garmin_connect_text: In the Garmin Connect™ app, add our contact as an email recipient for your LiveTrack sessions. That way, whenever you start LiveTrack, Garmin will send the tracking email to us.
gs_heres_a_video: Here's a video showing you how to do this:
gs_turn_on_auto_start_text:
It is recommended that you turn on Auto Start from the Garmin Connect™ app's LiveTrack menu. This way, your tracking link here is automatically updated, without you needing to manually start a LiveTrack session.

Beware, while LiveTrack is active on your Garmin device, it consumes more battery on both your phone and Garmin device.
gs_set_it_in_coros_app_text: In the Coros app, open Profile → Safety Alerts, click Add Emergency Contact. You can click the Contact icon in the Name field to select the newly created recipient, or you can fill it in manually.
gs_email_field_empty_title: The Email field doesn't fill automatically
gs_email_field_empty_text: If the Email field doesn't fill automatically when you select the contact, you can find the dedicated email address in the contact details. You can also copy it from below:
gs_enable_safety_alerts: With the emergency contact added, enable Safety Alerts to complete the setup. With that, whenever you start an activity, Coros will send the tracking email to us.
link_setup_we_received_notice: We received notice of your new activity, you're good to go!
link_setup_preview_your_latest_activity: You can preview your latest activity in the
link_setup_waiting_for_activity: We're waiting for you to start a new activity
link_setup_start_new_activity: Start a new activity on your device and start a tracking session from your companion app to verify that you set it up correctly.
ma_restricted_description: Only people with explicit access can open your tracking link.
ma_anyone_with_the_link_description: Anyone on the internet with the link can view your tracking session.
ma_people_with_access_text: The list of users with explicit access to your tracking link. If your link access is restricted, only those listed below that have been approved will be able to access your tracking link.
followers_issue_loading: There was an issue loading followers.
followers_permanently_or_temporarily: Do you want to permanently or temporarily {action} access?
no_livetrack_link_setup_yet: You don't have a tracking link set up yet.
visits_issue_loading: There was an issue loading visits.
following_text: The list of users you are following or sent a follow request to. If their link access is restricted, your follow request will need to be approved in order to access their tracking link.
following_issue_loading: There was an issue loading users you follow.
following_unfollow_text: You will no longer be able to access their tracking link if it is private and will no longer receive notifications when they start an activity.
toggle_notifications_tooltip: Get notified about when this user starts a new activity.
notifications_text: You can either choose to receive email notifications, push notifications on your browser or none at all. Push notifications on your browser are per-device. If you want to receive them on both your computer and phone, make sure to enable them on both devices via this page.
notifications_follow_request_title: When someone wants to follow you
notifications_new_activity_title: When someone you follow starts a new tracking session
notifications_self_new_activity_title: When you start a new tracking session
verify_email_text:
We've sent an email to {email} to verify your email address and activate your account.
Verifying your email address will let you activate email notifications and reset your password in case you lose it.
enable_notifications_text: Push notifications on this browser are not enabled yet. You can only receive push notifications on this device if you enabled notifications.
notifications_not_supported_title: Web push notifications are not supported on your device.
notifications_not_supported_body: Unfortunately, there is nothing you can do except enable emails as fallback notifications.
notifications_permission_denied: You've declined notifications. To allow them, go to your browser settings.
user_email_address_not_set: User email address is not set
user_with_email_already_exists: A user with this email address already exists
new_verify_link_sent: A new verify link was sent to your email.
failed_to_set_preferred_locale: Failed to set user preferred locale
tracking_link_does_not_exist: This tracking link does not exist.
tracking_link_is_not_public: This tracking link is not public.
livetrack_session_not_started: This tracking session has not started yet.
access_request_pending_approval: Your access request is pending approval.
token_invalid_or_expired: Token is invalid or has expired
invalid_action_token: Token does not allow this action
oauth_state_invalid_or_expired: OAuth state is invalid or has expired
sign_in_text: Enter your credentials below to sign in to your account
delete_account_text: This action cannot be undone. This will delete your account and all associated data.
sign_up_text: Enter your email and password below to create a new account
recover_account_text: Enter your email below and we will send you an email to reset your password
email_verification_success_text: Your email address was successfully verified. You can now close this page.
email_verification_error_text: Your email address couldn't be verified. {message}
reset_password_text: Create a new password for your account
mail_reset_password_p1: You requested to recover your password.
mail_reset_password_p2: If you think this is a mistake please notice the platform administrator.
mail_reset_password_click_get_new_one: Click here to get a new one
mail_reset_password_p3: You're receiving this email because a password reset was requested for your account.
mail_verify_email_p1: To activate your account, we just need to verify your email address:
mail_verify_email_p2: This will let you receive notifications and password resets from {appName}.
mail_verify_email_p3: You're receiving this email because you recently created an account at
mail_verify_email_p4: If it wasn't you, please ignore this email.
mail_new_follow_request_p1: Approving this will allow them to access your tracking link and receive notifications when you start an activity.
mail_new_follow_request_p2: You can manage access to your link and see your follow requests in your {tab} tab:
mail_new_activity_p1: You're receiving this email because you enabled notifications for {username}. You can manage notifications in your {label} tab.
mail_self_new_activity_p1: You're receiving this email because you enabled notifications. You can manage notifications in your {label} tab.
mail_trouble_clicking_button: If you're having trouble clicking the "{button}" button, copy and paste the URL below into your web browser:
notif_new_follow_request_body: You can review follow requests in your account.
push_notifications_not_setup_title: Push notifications are not set up
push_notifications_not_setup_body: Configure push notifications in your {tab} page to receive notifications on this device.
install_drawer_description: Follow those steps to add {appName} to your home screen.
install_unknown_text: Unfortunately, this browser doesn't allow installing this site on your device, please choose another browser like Chrome or Edge.
install_desktop_firefox_text: Unfortunately, Firefox doesn't allow installing this site on your device, please choose another browser like Chrome or Edge.
install_ios_safari_2: Swipe up and tap Add to Home Screen
install_ios_firefox_1: Tap menu in the bottom-right corner
install_ios_firefox_3: Swipe up and tap Add to Home Screen
install_ios_edge_1: Tap menu in the bottom-right corner
install_ios_edge_3: Swipe up and tap Add to Home Screen
install_ios_chrome_1: Tap Share in the address bar
install_ios_chrome_2: Swipe up and tap Add to Home Screen
install_ios_26_safari_1: Tap the three dots in the bottom-right corner
install_ios_26_safari_3: Tap the three dots of the More menu
install_android_firefox_1: Tap menu in the top-right corner
install_android_edge_1: Tap menu in the bottom-right corner
install_android_edge_2: Swipe left and tap Add to Phone
webpush_install_warning:
Web push notifications on this device are only available on installed web apps. To receive web push notifications on this device, you need to install this web app (add it to your home screen).
Or you can ignore this and use email notifications as a fallback.
webpush_pwa_warning:
Web push notifications work as long as your browser is open, even in the background. If you close it, you'll only receive pending notifications when you will next open it.
If you want to be able to receive notifications even when your browser is closed, you can add this site to your home screen (install as a web app).
app_footer_notice_text: This service is in no way related to Garmin® or COROS® but extends and simplifies the use of their safety tracking features.
gs_follow_someone_intro: Follow people to access their tracking link at any time and opt in to receive email or push notifications each time they start a new activity. If they made their tracking private, you will only be able to access it once they accept your follow request.
gs_follow_someone_via_link_text: If you already have someone's personal tracking link, open it in your browser. From there you can send them a follow request with the Follow button. Once they approve it (or if their link is public), you're in.
gs_follow_someone_via_invite_text: The person you want to follow can invite you directly from their Manage Access page. They'll get a link to give you that directly adds you to their followers.
gs_share_tracking_intro: Share your tracking so that others can follow your activities live and opt in to receive email or push notifications when you start your activity.
gs_invite_public_link_text: By default you tracking link is public. This means anyone who has the link can view your ongoing activity. Just share the URL below with whoever you want. You can make your link to private in the Manage access page.
gs_invite_private_link_title: Keep it private with explicit access
gs_invite_private_link_text: If your tracking link is set to restricted, only approved followers can view it. You can invite people directly or approve incoming follow requests from the Manage access page.
invite_people_text: Invite people to follow you by giving them a link.
single_use_description: The link will expire after used by one user.
multi_use_description: The link can be used by any number of users as long as its expiry date is not passed.
